---
title: "Notas de la clase 2026-04-21"
author: "Aleksander Dietrichson, PhD"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Tablas 

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
my_data <- readr::read_csv("../Proyecto | Varhulik & Loncarica/student_habits_performance.csv")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| label: tabla_nivel_educativo
#| tbl-cap: "Nivel educativo"
my_data %>% 
  count(parental_education_level) %>% 
  knitr::kable(col.names = c("Nivel Educativo","Numero"))
```

## Diagramas

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| label: figure_nivel_educativo
#| fig-cap: "Nivel educativo"
my_data %>% 
  count(gender) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=gender,y=n ,fill=gender))+
  geom_col()
```
